results.rendered_html:
ādiṣṭin a. One who gives orders.
(pb)
— m. (astyarthe ini).
1 A Brāhmaṇa in the first order of his life; a pupil, student (brahmacārin).
2 A penitent, one engaged in any expiatory rite;  Ms. 5. 88.
